reason: Successfully tested agent message sending and response verification - agent responded correctly to math question
steps: Navigate to http://localhost:47891 — Page loaded successfully showing the Gamut app with sidebar containing agents
Find and click "QA-20260702-223536-3ok7" agent in sidebar — Agent page loaded, URL changed to /agents/qa-20260702-223536-3ok7-hz9qh08v3v
Verify agent status is "running" or "idle" — Agent status displays as "idle" in the top right corner of the page
Type message "Hello! What is 2+2?" in the message input — Message typed successfully into the textbox, send button became enabled
Click send button to submit message — Message sent successfully, page navigated to new session URL with session title "Simple Math Question Session", agent status changed to "working"
Wait for agent response (up to 3 minutes) — Agent completed response in 1 second, "Working..." indicator disappeared, agent status returned to "idle"
Verify response mentions "4" and take screenshot — Response displays "2 + 2 = 4", clearly showing the number 4 in the answer, screenshot captured showing the complete conversation
